title: How to build a continuous evaluation pipeline for multi-agent systems with Gemini
summary: Google Cloud presents a framework for continuous evaluation of multi-agent systems using Gemini, combining data-driven assessment with adaptive rubrics and tool use quality metrics. The approach integrates shadow deployments and CI/CD automation to detect regressions and ensure production reliability without manual vibe checks.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech outlines a framework for continuously evaluating multi-agent systems built with Gemini, pairing data-driven assessment with adaptive rubrics and metrics that score tool use quality. The pipeline wires evaluation into shadow deployments and CI/CD automation so regressions surface before reaching production, replacing manual vibe checks. Key takeaways: adaptive rubrics and tool use metrics quantify agent behavior, shadow deployments test changes against real traffic without user impact, and automated checks in CI/CD flag reliability drops as part of the release process.
